final:
module ALU_8bit (
    input [7:0] obf_A,
    input [7:0] B,
    input [2:0] opcode,
    output reg [7:0] result
);

always @(*) begin
    case (opcode)
        3'b000: result = obf_A + B;     // Addition
        3'b001: result = obf_A - B;     // Subtraction
        3'b010: result = obf_A & B;     // AND
        3'b011: result = obf_A | B;     // OR
        3'b100: result = obf_A ^ B;     // XOR
        default: result = 8'b00000000; // Default case
    endcase
end

endmodule
